parameters.text:
=You are an elite Sales Development Representative Researcher. 

A new qualified lead has reached out. Their name is {{ $json.firstName }} {{ $json.lastName }} and they are the {{ $json.jobTitle }} at {{ $json.companyName }}.

Their specific inquiry/message was: "{{ $json.inquiry }}"

1. Use your Live Web Researcher Tool to quickly search for recent news updates about their company.
2. Use your Case Studies Database to find a relevant project.

Do NOT write an email draft. Instead, extract exactly 3 concise, highly relevant research bullet points about their company that a human SDR can use to build a custom pitch. 
- Bullet 1: A brief note on their specific problem.
- Bullet 2: A recent piece of news you saw about their company.
- Bullet 3: A reference to the relevant case study.

options.systemMessage: CRITICAL INSTRUCTION: You must return ONLY the 3 bullet points. Start immediately with '1.' Do not include any polite greetings, sign-offs, or other commentary. Make the bullet points punchy and actionable for the SDR.

parameters.content:
## RAG Agent
LangChain ReAct agent searches web + vector DB and
Outputs a 3-point research dossier

## Human In Loop Review
Pings #sales-alerts with firmographics + AI research brief.

parameters.jsCode:
// Webhooks put the payload inside a "body" wrapper. Let's extract it!
const payload = $input.item.json.body || $input.item.json;
let score = 0;

// Clean and normalize the data
payload.firstName = payload.firstName ? payload.firstName.trim() : 'Unknown';
payload.lastName = payload.lastName ? payload.lastName.trim() : 'Unknown';
payload.email = payload.email ? payload.email.trim().toLowerCase() : '';
payload.phone = payload.phone ? payload.phone.trim() : '';
payload.website = payload.website ? payload.website.trim() : '';
payload.companySize = payload.companySize ? payload.companySize.trim() : '';
payload.leadSource = payload.leadSource ? payload.leadSource.trim() : '';

// HubSpot Industry Enum Mapper - converts any plain text to valid HubSpot codes
const INDUSTRY_MAP = {
  'accounting': 'ACCOUNTING',
  'advertising': 'MARKETING_AND_ADVERTISING',
  'aerospace': 'AVIATION_AEROSPACE',
  'ai': 'COMPUTER_SOFTWARE',
  'artificial intelligence': 'COMPUTER_SOFTWARE',
  'automotive': 'AUTOMOTIVE',
  'banking': 'BANKING',
  'biotechnology': 'BIOTECHNOLOGY',
  'chemicals': 'CHEMICALS',
  'construction': 'CONSTRUCTION',
  'consulting': 'MANAGEMENT_CONSULTING',
  'consumer electronics': 'CONSUMER_ELECTRONICS',
  'consumer goods': 'CONSUMER_GOODS',
  'cybersecurity': 'COMPUTER_NETWORK_SECURITY',
  'defense': 'DEFENSE_SPACE',
  'design': 'DESIGN',
  'e-commerce': 'RETAIL',
  'ecommerce': 'RETAIL',
  'education': 'EDUCATION_MANAGEMENT',
  'electrical': 'ELECTRICAL_ELECTRONIC_MANUFACTURING',
  'electronics': 'CONSUMER_ELECTRONICS',
  'energy': 'OIL_ENERGY',
  'entertainment': 'ENTERTAINMENT',
  'environmental': 'ENVIRONMENTAL_SERVICES',
  'finance': 'FINANCIAL_SERVICES',
  'financial services': 'FINANCIAL_SERVICES',
  'fintech': 'FINANCIAL_SERVICES',
  'food': 'FOOD_BEVERAGES',
  'government': 'GOVERNMENT_ADMINISTRATION',
  'hardware': 'COMPUTER_HARDWARE',
  'health': 'HOSPITAL_HEALTH_CARE',
  'healthcare': 'HOSPITAL_HEALTH_CARE',
  'hospitality': 'HOSPITALITY',
  'hr': 'HUMAN_RESOURCES',
  'human resources': 'HUMAN_RESOURCES',
  'information technology': 'INFORMATION_TECHNOLOGY_AND_SERVICES',
  'insurance': 'INSURANCE',
  'internet': 'INTERNET',
  'it': 'INFORMATION_TECHNOLOGY_AND_SERVICES',
  'legal': 'LEGAL_SERVICES',
  'logistics': 'LOGISTICS_AND_SUPPLY_CHAIN',
  'manufacturing': 'MECHANICAL_OR_INDUSTRIAL_ENGINEERING',
  'marketing': 'MARKETING_AND_ADVERTISING',
  'media': 'MEDIA_PRODUCTION',
  'medical': 'MEDICAL_PRACTICE',
  'military': 'MILITARY',
  'mining': 'MINING_METALS',
  'networking': 'COMPUTER_NETWORKING',
  'non-profit': 'NON_PROFIT_ORGANIZATION_MANAGEMENT',
  'nonprofit': 'NON_PROFIT_ORGANIZATION_MANAGEMENT',
  'oil': 'OIL_ENERGY',
  'pharmaceuticals': 'PHARMACEUTICALS',
  'publishing': 'PUBLISHING',
  'real estate': 'REAL_ESTATE',
  'recruiting': 'STAFFING_AND_RECRUITING',
  'renewables': 'RENEWABLES_ENVIRONMENT',
  'research': 'RESEARCH',
  'retail': 'RETAIL',
  'saas': 'COMPUTER_SOFTWARE',
  'security': 'SECURITY_AND_INVESTIGATIONS',
  'semiconductors': 'SEMICONDUCTORS',
  'software': 'COMPUTER_SOFTWARE',
  'sports': 'SPORTS',
  'staffing': 'STAFFING_AND_RECRUITING',
  'telecommunications': 'TELECOMMUNICATIONS',
  'telecom': 'TELECOMMUNICATIONS',
  'transportation': 'TRANSPORTATION_TRUCKING_RAILROAD',
  'travel': 'LEISURE_TRAVEL_TOURISM',
  'utilities': 'UTILITIES',
  'venture capital': 'VENTURE_CAPITAL_PRIVATE_EQUITY',
  'wholesale': 'WHOLESALE',
  'wireless': 'WIRELESS'
};

const rawIndustry = payload.industry ? payload.industry.trim().toLowerCase() : '';
payload.industry = INDUSTRY_MAP[rawIndustry] || 'INFORMATION_TECHNOLOGY_AND_SERVICES';

const title = payload.jobTitle ? payload.jobTitle.toLowerCase() : '';
if (title.includes('ceo') || title.includes('founder') || title.includes('director')) {
  score += 50;
} else if (title.includes('manager')) {
  score += 30;
}

if (payload.companySize === '1000+' || payload.companySize === '201-1000') {
  score += 20;
}

// Return the cleaned data so the rest of the workflow can read it
return { ...payload, leadScore: score, isQualified: score >= 30, isFacebookAd: payload.leadSource && payload.leadSource.includes('Facebook') ? 'true' : 'false' };

parameters.name: case_studies_database
parameters.description: Call this tool to search for past case studies, company knowledge, or successful projects based on the user's inquiry topic. IMPORTANT: Provide a specific search query.

additionalFields.aboutUs: ={{ 'An enterprise prospect operating in the ' + $('Normalize & Score Lead').item.json.industry + ' industry. Funding Stage: ' + $('Clearbit CRM Enrichment (Mock API)').item.json.enrichedData.recentFundingRound + '. Captured via AI Inbound SDR Pipeline.' }}
additionalFields.description: ={{ 'Tech Stack: ' + $('Clearbit CRM Enrichment (Mock API)').item.json.enrichedData.techStack.join(', ') + ' | Intent Score: ' + $('Clearbit CRM Enrichment (Mock API)').item.json.enrichedData.intentScore }}

parameters.text:
={{ '🚨 *HOT LEAD ALERT* 🚨
*Name:* ' + $('Normalize & Score Lead').item.json.firstName + ' ' + $('Normalize & Score Lead').item.json.lastName + '
*Company:* ' + $('Normalize & Score Lead').item.json.companyName + ' (' + $('Normalize & Score Lead').item.json.companySize + ' employees)
*Lead Score:* ' + $('Normalize & Score Lead').item.json.leadScore + '

*AI Research Dossier:*
' + $('Autonomous SDR').item.json.output }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "q_person_name": "{{ $('Normalize & Score Lead').item.json.firstName }} {{ $('Normalize & Score Lead').item.json.lastName }}",
  "q_organization_domains": ["{{ $('Normalize & Score Lead').item.json.website }}"],
  "person_titles": ["{{ $('Normalize & Score Lead').item.json.jobTitle }}"],
  "page": 1,
  "per_page": 1
}
